hero.headline: From zero to your first DeFi perpetual trade in 30 minutes
hero.subheading: One-stop analysis + execution: connect wallet, pick market, risk-manage, submit

toc.title: Sign in to this app with MetaMask
Sign in to Hyperliquid with MetaMask

content.title: Prepare MetaMask
items: Use MetaMask only (desktop: browser extension; mobile: use MetaMask app's in-app browser to open this app)
Create a fresh address for practice; avoid mixing with main funds
Back up seed phrase securely and offline

content.title: Connect your wallet
items: Click ‘Connect Wallet’ on the top-right or the button below
Authorize read-only access and message signing

content.title: Prepare funds & network
items: Perpetuals on Hyperliquid require available balance in your account
If coming from CEX/on-chain, see next section for funding paths

content.title: One-stop analysis + execution
items: Pick a market (e.g., BTC, ETH)
Set position size and leverage, configure stop-loss/take-profit
Confirm; wallet signs and transaction is sent automatically

content.title: Time budget
content.text: Expect 15–30 minutes end-to-end for the first run; faster thereafter.
This app supports MetaMask only. On desktop, use the browser extension; on mobile, open this app inside the MetaMask in-app browser to connect.

content.title: Desktop (Chrome/Brave/Edge)
items: Install MetaMask from your browser's extension store
Pin the extension, then create/import wallet
Write down the seed phrase offline and set a strong password

content.title: Mobile (iOS/Android)
items: Install MetaMask from App Store/Google Play
Open MetaMask and use its in-app browser
Open this app's URL inside the in-app browser to connect

content.title: Security
content.text: Never enter your seed/private key into any website. This app will never ask for them.

sections.title: Sign in to this app with MetaMask

content.text: We only read your public address and request signatures after you authorize. We do not initiate fund transfers.

content.title: Desktop
items: Open this app and click ‘Connect Wallet’
Select MetaMask in wallet popup and approve
If a signature is requested to verify ownership, follow the prompt

content.title: Mobile
items: Open this app via MetaMask's in-app browser
Tap ‘Connect Wallet’ and approve within MetaMask
Complete any required signature prompts

sections.title: Sign in to Hyperliquid with MetaMask

content.text: Before trading, complete account connection/registration on Hyperliquid.

content.title: Steps
items: On desktop, visit https://app.hyperliquid.xyz on mobile, use MetaMask's in-app browser
Click ‘Connect Wallet’ and choose MetaMask
Approve connection and required signature in MetaMask
On first time, follow prompts to complete registration (e.g., set a username)

content.title: Note
content.text: After Hyperliquid setup, return to our Trading Panel to place orders.
To trade perpetuals on Hyperliquid, ensure your account has tradable balance. Common funding paths:

content.title: Common funding paths
items: Withdraw from a CEX to your on-chain wallet
Bridge assets to the target network/account
Swap into the margin asset required (e.g., USDC)

content.title: Start small
content.text: Begin with a small amount to validate the flow, then scale up.

content.title: Pick a market
items: Choose a perpetual market (e.g., BTC-PERP)
Review price, funding rate, 24h change, and basics

content.title: Set size and leverage
items: Enter quantity or notional and choose leverage
System estimates required margin and liquidation price

content.title: Configure risk (recommended)
items: Set stop-loss to cap max loss
Set take-profit to secure targets
Prioritize risk parameters over return expectations

content.title: Confirm & sign
items: Review order summary and submit
Wallet prompts signature; upon confirm, transaction is sent

content.title: Congrats!
content.text: Your first perpetual order has been submitted. Track positions and orders, and adjust SL/TP anytime.
Leverage amplifies both returns and losses. Trade only with funds you can afford to lose, and enforce risk controls.

content.title: Core principles
items: Risk per trade ≤ 1–2% of available capital
Keep total leverage exposure controlled, especially in high volatility
Always place and respect stop-loss; avoid ‘averaging down’

content.title: Common tools
items: Stop-loss: auto close when trigger price hits
Take-profit: auto realize gains at targets
Scale-out: reduce size into strength to lock in profits

faq.q: Why do I need to sign? Can it drain my funds?
faq.a: On-chain operations require wallet signatures to authorize. Signing doesn’t reveal your private key or auto-transfer funds. Only sign on trusted sites for clear intents.
Start with a small, acceptable loss amount (e.g., $50–$200) to validate the flow and build risk habits.
Perpetuals use periodic payments between longs and shorts to anchor to spot. Positive rate: longs pay shorts; negative: shorts pay longs.
It depends on price, leverage, margin, and platform rules. Higher leverage and lower margin move it closer to mark price; we show an estimate before placing.

glossary.def: Tool managing private keys and addresses, used for signing and transactions.
Word sequence to recover a wallet. Store offline securely.
No-expiry derivative anchored via funding payments.
Multiplier increasing notional exposure and risk.
Forced close when margin is insufficient.
Periodic payments between longs and shorts to anchor price.

troubleshooting.issue: Cannot connect wallet / no signature popup
fix: Ensure wallet extension installed and unlocked
Check popup/script blockers (privacy settings or extensions)

troubleshooting.issue: Order failed or pending too long
fix: Check network status and fees; retry later if congested
Reduce leverage or order size and try again
Click refresh and wait for sync
Cross-device login may cause cache delays
If persists, contact us with tx hash
